message:
fix: replace raw <button> elements with shared Button component (#3188) (#3213)

Convert raw <button> elements to the shared Button component in
CardRecommendations, DashboardCards, and StatBlockModePicker for
consistent styling, accessibility (auto aria-label), and loading states.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
